name: Diffbot
description: Diffbot's general-purpose web crawler, used to build its Knowledge Graph and power its structured-extraction APIs. Diffbot documents robots.txt behavior but publishes no IP list, ASN, or reverse-DNS pattern.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows; U; Windows NT 5.1; en-US; rv:1.9.1.2) Gecko/20090729 Firefox/3.5.2 (.NET CLR 3.5.30729; Diffbot/0.1; +http://www.diffbot.com)
